reasoning: The FedRAMP AU-6 control focuses on audit record review, analysis, and reporting. In Kubernetes, this maps to ensuring that audit logging is enabled, logs are retained for analysis, audit policies capture necessary metadata, and there is a mechanism for analyzing these logs. Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to capture detailed information about API server requests, which can then be analyzed for security and compliance purposes.
title: Audit Record Review, Analysis, and Reporting
